texto: When Whitney Houston died, I felt great sadness. My sadness, of course, was about our collective loss - when you listened to this nightingale sing, your body would drop into a chair, your head would tilt up, a small smile would creep across your face, and inside you knew that there was a higher power somewhere: gifted, beautiful, spiritual.
explicacao: Citação de James Belushi sobre temas ligados a fe. “When Whitney Houston died, I felt great sadness. My sadness, of course, was about our collective …” articula fe, smile, beautiful em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: When Whitney Houston died, I felt great sadness. My sadness, of course, was about our collective loss - when you listened to this nightingale sing, your body would drop into a chair, your head would tilt up, a small smile would creep across your face, and inside you knew that there was a higher power somewhere: gifted, beautiful, spiritual.

texto: Accidents happen, whether they're car accidents, friendly fire, drug overdoses. Accidents happen, and they're tragic. It's like a bomb that goes off and pieces of shrapnel rip into the flesh of the family. It's the families that need the compassion, because everywhere they walk, every day, someone reminds them of their loss.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a James Belushi: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “Accidents happen, whether they're car accidents, friendly fire, drug overdoses. Accidents happen,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, day, car pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e luto.
